summary: Excellent soundboard recording of the magical April 4 1971 show, featuring outstanding Garcia, Lesh, Weir and Kreutzmann performances.
review: The reviewer hails this April‑71 Manhattan Center concert as a “must‑have,” praising the crystal‑clear guitar, bass, rhythm‑guitar and drum tones. The soundboard source is described as superb, though no specific technical issues are noted beyond a recommendation to use an EQ for optimal playback.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly enthusiastic 5‑star review; reviewer praises both the musical performance and the recording quality, justifying a top‑tier rating but limited confidence due to single data point.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the sound was never better and suggests using an EQ during playback; no complaints about noise or dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific set‑list comments, but overall described as a magical performance from the April ’71 era.
